problem id: 7283eb09
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(7) OR SHR(4)

examples:
  00100000 -> 00010010
  10001000 -> 01001100
  00101110 -> 00010111
  10100100 -> 01011010
  01101110 -> 00110111
  01000101 -> 10100110
  01000111 -> 10100111
  10001101 -> 11001110
  10101011 -> 11011111
  00111100 -> 00011111

query: 01001101
predicted answer: 10100110
